hero.name: Hi, I am Pranjal
hero.subtitle: B.Tech CSE Student at Poornima University building intelligent systems from data to deployment.

about.intro: As a B.Tech CSE student specializing in AI, Machine Learning, and DevOps, I focus on designing practical intelligent systems and deploying them with reliability. I enjoy translating ideas into real products through clean architecture, robust engineering, and performance-driven implementation.
